name: Bulk Tag Request
shortDescription: Apply tag changes to multiple VMs in a single request
description: Bulk tag remediation for applying consistent tag changes across multiple virtual machines. Supports CSV upload for VM lists, performs per-VM impact analysis, applies tags in controlled batches with rate limiting, and generates a comprehensive summary report.

variables.name: vm_list
variables.label: VM List (CSV)
variables.helpText: Upload a CSV file with columns: vm_name, Region, SecurityZone, Environment, AppCI, SystemRole. Maximum 500 VMs per request.

variables.name: operation_type
variables.label: Operation Type

choices.label: Apply Tags — Set specified tag values
Remediate Drift — Sync tags to CMDB state
Update Category — Change a single tag category across all VMs

variables.helpText: Type of bulk operation to perform

variables.name: target_region
variables.label: Target Region (if single category update)
variables.helpText: Required when Operation Type is 'Update Category' and target category is Region

variables.name: target_security_zone
variables.label: Target Security Zone (if single category update)
variables.helpText: Required when Operation Type is 'Update Category' and target category is SecurityZone

variables.name: target_environment
variables.label: Target Environment (if single category update)
variables.helpText: Required when Operation Type is 'Update Category' and target category is Environment

variables.name: dry_run
variables.label: Dry Run
variables.helpText: When checked, generates an impact report without applying changes. Uncheck to apply changes.

variables.name: justification
variables.label: Business Justification
variables.helpText: Business justification for the bulk tag operation
